items.title: Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
items.summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.

items.title: Motorcyclist Reunites with Strangers Who Lifted a 3,300-Lb. Car Off His Body
items.summary: In Queensland, a father of 2 is alive to see his daughters again thanks to a horde of Good Samaritans who rushed to his side after he was pinned under a car during a collision. Lifting with “all their…
